recommended_medicines: No cancer-specific drug is usually recommended
benign.disclaimer: This system is for screening support only and is not a medical diagnosis. Please consult a licensed clinician for any symptoms or follow-up questions.

malignant.dosage: Dose depends on cancer subtype, stage, receptor status, age, weight, and oncology protocol
supporting_actions: Confirm subtype with pathology and receptor testing
Discuss chemotherapy, hormone therapy, targeted therapy, and radiation with an oncologist
malignant.disclaimer: This is a high-risk screening result and requires urgent clinical review. Do not self-medicate; consult an oncologist immediately.
